summary: Comprehensive HR Module V2 testing completed. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI verified. Major features working: HR Manager tab visibility (no Dashboard), CEO sees all tabs, Admin page with Employees/Countries tabs, Employee modal with 5 tabs, Mechanic salary form with Price Per Inspection, Countries with currency management.

minor.issue: Model required user_id in body but API sets it from URL path - FIXED by making user_id optional in model

passed_tests: Backend API - CEO login returns role_code=CEO (200)
Backend API - HR Manager login returns role_code=HR_MANAGER (200)
Backend API - Sales Exec login returns role_code=SALES_EXEC (200)
Backend API - CEO visible_tabs includes leads, customers, inspections, employees, settings
Backend API - HR Manager visible_tabs includes employees, settings but NOT leads, customers, inspections
Backend API - Sales Exec visible_tabs includes leads but NOT employees
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees (CEO) returns employee list (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees (HR Manager) returns employee list - full access to all countries (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees (Sales Exec) returns 403 Forbidden
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary returns salary structure (200)
Backend API - POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary saves full-time salary with Basic, HRA, Variable Pay (200)
Backend API - POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/salary saves mechanic salary with price_per_inspection (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents returns documents list (200)
Backend API - POST /api/hr/employees/{id}/documents adds document (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/attendance returns attendance with summary (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/employees/{id}/audit returns audit trail (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/countries (CEO) returns countries with currency, phone_code, employee_count (200)
Backend API - GET /api/hr/countries (HR Manager) returns all countries - Indian HR full access (200)
Backend API - POST /api/hr/countries creates country with currency_symbol and phone_code (200)
Backend API - POST /api/hr/employees creates employee with password and generates employee_code (200)
Backend API - MECHANIC role has empty TAB_VISIBILITY (no CRM access)
Frontend - HR Manager sees only Admin and Settings tabs (no Dashboard/Leads/Customers)
Frontend - CEO sees all tabs: Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Settings
Frontend - Sales Executive sees only Leads tab
Frontend - Admin page has Employees and Countries tabs
Frontend - Employees tab shows Role, Country, Status, Salary Info, Docs, Audit columns
Frontend - Countries tab shows Currency (symbol + code), Phone Code, Employee count, Status
Frontend - Employee modal has 5 tabs: Details, Salary, Documents, Attendance, Audit
Frontend - Details tab shows Full Name, Email, Phone, Country, Role, Department, Employment Type, Bank Details
Frontend - Salary tab for full-time shows Earnings (Basic, HRA, Conveyance, Medical, Special, Variable), Deductions (PF, Professional Tax, Income Tax), Net Salary
Frontend - Salary tab for Mechanic shows 'Freelancer / Mechanic Compensation' with Price Per Inspection and Commission %
Frontend - Documents tab shows document list with Add Document button
Frontend - Attendance tab shows Present, Absent, Half Day, On Leave summary
Frontend - Audit tab shows per-employee audit trail with action, user, timestamp, details

test_credentials.HR Manager: hr@wisedrive.com / password123 (sees only Admin and Settings)

seed_data_creation: Test salary structures and documents created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: HR Module V2 fully tested. Key features verified: 1) HR Manager has no dashboard access (only Admin/Settings tabs), 2) CEO sees all tabs, 3) Admin page has unified Employees tab and Countries tab, 4) Employee modal has 5 tabs (Details, Salary, Documents, Attendance, Audit), 5) Salary form changes based on role - Mechanic shows Price Per Inspection, Full-time shows Basic/HRA/Variable/PF/Tax, 6) Countries tab shows currency with symbol and phone code, 7) Indian HR has full access to all countries, 8) Per-employee audit trail in modal.

mocked_apis.Vaahan car lookup API: MOCKED in LeadsPage.jsx payment modal - returns mock car data

features_verified.HR Manager Tab Visibility: Only Admin and Settings tabs visible (no Dashboard/Leads/Customers)
features_verified.CEO Tab Visibility: All tabs visible: Leads, Customers, Inspections, Admin, Settings
features_verified.Admin Page Tabs: Employees tab and Countries tab present
features_verified.Employee Modal 5 Tabs: Details, Salary, Documents, Attendance, Audit tabs all working
features_verified.Mechanic Salary Form: Shows 'Freelancer / Mechanic Compensation' with Price Per Inspection and Commission %
features_verified.Full-time Salary Form: Shows Earnings (Basic, HRA, etc.), Deductions (PF, Tax), Net Salary
features_verified.Countries Tab: Shows Currency (symbol + code), Phone Code, Employee count, Status
features_verified.Indian HR Full Access: HR Manager can access all countries
features_verified.Per-Employee Audit Trail: Audit tab in modal shows employee-specific audit history
